🎙

Record Your Voice

Record your own voice to replace the text-to-speech. Your recordings are stored on this device.

What to record:

${['greeting','correct','incorrect','arabic_bismillah','english_welcome'].map(k=>`
${{greeting:'Welcome Greeting',correct:'Correct Answer',incorrect:'Incorrect Answer',arabic_bismillah:'Arabic Opening',english_welcome:'English Welcome'}[k]}
Say something like: "${{greeting:'Assalamu alaikum, welcome to Quran Quest',correct:'Mashallah, correct!',incorrect:'Not quite, try again',arabic_bismillah:'Bismillahi r-rahmani r-rahim',english_welcome:'Welcome, let us learn the Quran together'}[k]}"
${customVoiceClips&&customVoiceClips[k]?`✓`:''}
`).join('')}

💡 Tip: Once recorded, your voice clips play when you tap 🔊 buttons throughout the app.

🔑 Firebase API Key

Paste your Firebase Web API Key to enable live sync.

Where to find your API Key:
1. Open Firebase Console → Project Settings ↗
2. Scroll to Your apps → Web App
3. Copy the apiKey value (starts with AIzaSy...)
4. Paste above and tap Save & Connect
